CCS:RATE_CARD_SOURCE_FACILITY_INVALID.description: The source facility in one of the rate cards of <0>{{validityMonth}}</0> is not valid, please update the <1>contract</1> and try again.

CCS:RATE_CARD_CONTRACT_STATE_INVALID.description: Rate cards cannot be created/updated for a canceled contract. If you have any questions or require further assistance, please reach out to supporttms@zalando.de

CCS:RATE_CARD_OVERLAPPING_DIMENSIONS.description: It appears that another rate card already exists with the selected facilities/ranges. To avoid conflicts, please refresh the page and review the existing rate cards or make adjustments to the current one accordingly.

CCS:RATE_CARD_NOT_FOUND.description: The rate card you're trying to update/delete does not exist. It might have been deleted previously. Please make sure you are referring to the correct rate card.

CCS:RATE_CARD_PRICE_SET_INVALID_PRICE.description: The shipment rate cards are invalid for <0>{{validityMonth}}</0>, there is mismatch of services and prices, please update the <1>contract</1> and try again.

CCS:ADDITIONAL_SERVICE_RATE_INVALID_FACI.description: The service you're trying to add/update is not configured in the contract for this facility. Please check the contract details and ensure the service is valid for this location before proceeding.

CCS:ADDITIONAL_SERVICE_RATE_INVALID_CONT.description: The additional service you're attempting to add/update is not currently configured in the contract. To proceed, please make sure that the service is configured in the contract.

CCS:ADDITIONAL_SERVICE_RATE_NOT_FOUND.description: The additional service rate you're trying to update/delete no longer exists. It may have been deleted previously. Please ensure you are referring to the correct rate.
